# neural-lam

Welcome to the neural-lam documentation.

neural-lam is a repository of graph-based neural weather prediction models
for Limited Area Modeling (LAM). It is developed by the MLLAM community.

## Getting started

- {doc}`installation` - Set up neural-lam on your machine
- {doc}`quickstart` - Run your first model

## API Reference

The {doc}`api/index` is auto-generated from the source code docstrings.
